Package noppes.npcs.api.ability.type

Interface IAbilityZone

  • All Superinterfaces:
    IAbility, IAbilityAction
    All Known Subinterfaces:
    IAbilityHazard, IAbilityTrap
    public interface IAbilityZone
extends IAbility
    API interface for zone-based abilities (Trap, Hazard). Shared zone properties: duration, shape, spawn, visual layers, colors.

    • Method Detail

      • getDurationTicks

        int getDurationTicks()
        Returns:
        Duration of the zone in ticks.

      • setDurationTicks

        void setDurationTicks​(int ticks)
        Parameters:
        ticks - Zone duration in ticks.

      • getZoneShapeOrdinal

        int getZoneShapeOrdinal()
        Returns:
        Zone shape ordinal (0=CIRCLE, 1=SQUARE).

      • setZoneShapeOrdinal

        void setZoneShapeOrdinal​(int shape)
        Parameters:
        shape - Zone shape ordinal (0=CIRCLE, 1=SQUARE).

      • getSpawnRadius

        float getSpawnRadius()
        Returns:
        Spawn offset radius from the caster in blocks.

      • setSpawnRadius

        void setSpawnRadius​(float radius)
        Parameters:
        radius - Spawn offset radius in blocks.

      • getZoneCount

        int getZoneCount()
        Returns:
        Number of zones spawned per use.

      • setZoneCount

        void setZoneCount​(int count)
        Parameters:
        count - Number of zones to spawn.

      • getZoneHeight

        float getZoneHeight()
        Returns:
        Visual height of the zone in blocks.

      • setZoneHeight

        void setZoneHeight​(float height)
        Parameters:
        height - Zone height in blocks.

      • getParticleDensity

        float getParticleDensity()
        Returns:
        Density of particles in the zone effect.

      • setParticleDensity

        void setParticleDensity​(float density)
        Parameters:
        density - Particle density.

      • getParticleScale

        float getParticleScale()
        Returns:
        Scale of individual particles.

      • setParticleScale

        void setParticleScale​(float scale)
        Parameters:

        float getAnimSpeed()
        Returns:
        Animation speed multiplier for zone visual effects.

        void setAnimSpeed​(float speed)
        Parameters:
        speed - Animation speed multiplier.

      • getLightningDensity

        float getLightningDensity()
        Returns:
        Density of lightning arcs in the zone.

        void setLightningDensity​(float density)
        Parameters:
        density - Lightning arc density.

      • getInnerColor

        int getInnerColor()
        Returns:
        Inner (core) color as a packed RGB integer.

      • setInnerColor

        void setInnerColor​(int color)
        Parameters:
        color - Inner color as a packed RGB integer.

      • getOuterColor

        int getOuterColor()
        Returns:
        Outer (glow) color as a packed RGB integer.

      • setOuterColor

        void setOuterColor​(int color)
        Parameters:
        color - Outer color as a packed RGB integer.

      • isOuterColorEnabled

        boolean isOuterColorEnabled()
        Returns:
        Whether the outer color layer is rendered.

      • setOuterColorEnabled

        void setOuterColorEnabled​(boolean enabled)
        Parameters:
        enabled - Whether to render the outer color layer.

      • isGroundFill

        boolean isGroundFill()
        Returns:
        Whether the ground fill layer is rendered.

      • setGroundFill

        void setGroundFill​(boolean enabled)
        Parameters:
        enabled - Whether to render the ground fill.

      • getGroundAlpha

        float getGroundAlpha()
        Returns:
        Alpha (opacity) of the ground fill layer (0.0-1.0).

      • setGroundAlpha

        void setGroundAlpha​(float alpha)
        Parameters:
        alpha - Ground fill opacity (0.0-1.0).

      • isRings

        boolean isRings()
        Returns:
        Whether ring decorations are rendered.

      • setRings

        void setRings​(boolean enabled)
        Parameters:
        enabled - Whether to render rings.

      • getRingCount

        int getRingCount()
        Returns:
        Number of concentric rings in the zone.

      • setRingCount

        void setRingCount​(int count)
        Parameters:
        count - Number of rings.

      • isBorder

        boolean isBorder()
        Returns:
        Whether the border outline is rendered.

      • setBorder

        void setBorder​(boolean enabled)
        Parameters:
        enabled - Whether to render the border.

      • getBorderSpeed

        float getBorderSpeed()
        Returns:
        Rotation speed of the border in degrees per tick.

      • setBorderSpeed

        void setBorderSpeed​(float speed)
        Parameters:
        speed - Border rotation speed.

      • isAccents

        boolean isAccents()
        Returns:
        Whether accent decorations are rendered.

      • setAccents

        void setAccents​(boolean enabled)
        Parameters:
        enabled - Whether to render accents.

      • getAccentStyle

        int getAccentStyle()
        Returns:
        Accent style ordinal (0=STATIC, 1=SWAYING, 2=FLICKERING).

      • setAccentStyle

        void setAccentStyle​(int style)
        Parameters:
        style - Accent style ordinal (0=STATIC, 1=SWAYING, 2=FLICKERING).

      • isLightning

        boolean isLightning()
        Returns:
        Whether lightning arcs are rendered in the zone.

      • setLightning

        void setLightning​(boolean enabled)
        Parameters:
        enabled - Whether to render lightning.

      • isParticles

        boolean isParticles()
        Returns:
        Whether particles are rendered in the zone.

        void setParticles​(boolean enabled)
        Parameters:
        enabled - Whether to render particles.

      • getParticleMotion

        int getParticleMotion()
        Returns:
        Particle motion style ordinal (0=RISING, 1=DRIFTING, 2=SPARKS).

      • setParticleMotion

        void setParticleMotion​(int motion)
        Parameters:
        motion - Particle motion style ordinal (0=RISING, 1=DRIFTING, 2=SPARKS).

      • getParticleDir

        String getParticleDir()
        Returns:
        Resource directory path for custom particle textures.

      • setParticleDir

        void setParticleDir​(String directory)
        Parameters:
        directory - Resource directory path for particle textures.

      • getParticleSize

        int getParticleSize()
        Returns:
        Size of individual particles in pixels.

      • setParticleSize

        void setParticleSize​(int size)
        Parameters:
        size - Particle size in pixels.

      • isParticleGlow

        boolean isParticleGlow()
        Returns:
        Whether particles use the glow (fullbright) render mode.

        Parameters:
        glow - Whether particles glow.
